_configVersion_comment: DO NOT MODIFY: This field is used by NeoEssentials for automatic config updates. Changing this may cause config corruption.

economy.sellMultiplier_comment: Multiplier applied to all sell prices. 1.0 = 100%, 0.5 = 50%, 2.0 = 200%.
economy.allowSellNamedItems_comment: Whether players can sell items with custom display names (renamed items). Essentials: allow-sell-named-items.

webDashboard.webDashboard_comment: Web Dashboard configuration - controls the built-in web interface for server monitoring and management
webDashboard.enabled_comment: Enable or disable the web dashboard system entirely
webDashboard.autoStart_comment: Automatically start the web dashboard when server starts. If false, use /dashboard start command
webDashboard.port_comment: Port number for the web dashboard HTTP server (1024-65535). Requires server restart to take effect
webDashboard.websocketPort_comment: Port number for the WebSocket server used for real-time dashboard updates (1024-65535). Use a different port from HTTP server. Many hosting providers assign random ports - configure both ports based on your provider's requirements
webDashboard.bindAddress_comment: IP address to bind to. '0.0.0.0' binds to all network interfaces (recommended). Users access the dashboard via http://YOUR_SERVER_IP:8080 (replace YOUR_SERVER_IP with your actual server's IP address or domain). Use '127.0.0.1' for localhost-only access (more secure but only accessible from the server machine itself).
webDashboard.enableCORS_comment: Enable Cross-Origin Resource Sharing headers. Useful for development and external integrations
webDashboard.maxThreads_comment: Maximum number of concurrent HTTP request handler threads

apiSettings.maxLogLines_comment: Maximum number of log lines that can be requested at once
apiSettings.defaultLogLines_comment: Default number of log lines when not specified in request
apiSettings.enableSensitiveInfoFiltering_comment: Automatically filter IPs, UUIDs, and passwords from logs
apiSettings.cacheTimeout_comment: Cache API responses for this many seconds to reduce server load (0 to disable)

securitySettings.securitySettings_comment: Security configuration for the web dashboard
securitySettings.requireAuthentication_comment: Require Bearer token authentication to access dashboard API endpoints. Strongly recommended.
securitySettings.allowConfigEditing_comment: Allow config file editing through the web interface
securitySettings.restrictedConfigPaths_comment: List of config file paths that cannot be edited via web dashboard
securitySettings.enableRateLimiting_comment: Enable per-IP rate limiting for dashboard API requests.
securitySettings.maxRequestsPerMinute_comment: Maximum API requests per minute per IP address when rate limiting is enabled.

uiSettings.refreshInterval_comment: Auto-refresh interval in seconds for dashboard data
uiSettings.showPlayerUUIDs_comment: Show player UUIDs in the player list
uiSettings.enableNotifications_comment: Enable browser notifications for important events

loggingSettings.logDashboardAccess_comment: Log when the dashboard is accessed
loggingSettings.logAPIRequests_comment: Log all API requests (verbose, for debugging)
loggingSettings.logConfigChanges_comment: Log when config files are modified via dashboard

items.items_comment: Item system configuration - controls item spawning, enchantments, and stack sizes
items.permission-based-item-spawn_comment: Require permission to spawn items. Permissions: 'neoessentials.item.spawn' (general), 'neoessentials.item.spawn.<namespace>.<item>' (specific), 'neoessentials.item.spawn.<namespace>.*' (wildcard)
items.oversized-stacksize_comment: Maximum stack size for oversized stacks. Items can stack up to this limit when default-stack-size allows
items.default-stack-size_comment: Default stack size for all items. -1 = use vanilla behavior, otherwise overrides vanilla stack sizes (capped at oversized-stacksize)
items.unsafe-enchantments_comment: Allow enchantments beyond vanilla limits (e.g., Sharpness X)
items.max-unsafe-enchantment-level_comment: Maximum level allowed for unsafe enchantments when enabled
items.item-spawn-blacklist_comment: List of items that cannot be spawned via commands, even with permissions

afk.afkkickMessage: Kicked for being AFK too long

kits.skipUsedOneTimeKitsFromKitList_comment: When enabled, one-time use kits (i.e., delay < 0) will be removed from '/kit list' when a player can no longer use them.
kits.kitAutoEquip_comment: When enabled, armor from kits will automatically be equipped as long as the player's armor slots are empty.
kits.pastebinCreatekit_comment: If true, /createkit will give the user a link with the kit code. If false, /createkit will add the kit to the 'kits.json' config file directly.
kits.maxKitsPerPlayer_comment: Maximum number of kits a single player can have active cooldowns for. -1 for unlimited.
kits.allowKitOverride_comment: Allow players with permission to bypass kit cooldowns and restrictions.
kits.enableKitPreview_comment: Allow players to preview kit contents before claiming them.
kits.logKitUsage_comment: Log kit usage to server logs for tracking purposes.

commandCosts.commandCosts_comment: Defines the cost to use kit commands PER USE. Some commands have sub-costs.

newPlayerKit.newPlayerKit_comment: Kit given to players on their first join, regardless of cost and permissions
newPlayerKit.kitName_comment: Set to empty string '' to disable, or specify a kit name like 'starter'

teleportation.teleportation_comment: Teleportation system configuration - controls home, warp, spawn, and teleport request functionality

homeSettings.maxHomes_comment: Maximum number of homes a player can set. -1 for unlimited.
homeSettings.allowCrossDimensionHomes_comment: Allow players to set homes in different dimensions (Nether, End, etc.)
homeSettings.homeSetCooldown_comment: Cooldown in seconds between setting homes. 0 to disable.
homeSettings.homeTeleportCooldown_comment: Cooldown in seconds between home teleports. 0 to disable.
homeSettings.homeDeleteCooldown_comment: Cooldown in seconds between deleting homes. 0 to disable.
homeSettings.requireConfirmationForDelete_comment: Require players to confirm home deletion to prevent accidents.
homeSettings.enableHomeTeleportSafety_comment: Check if home location is safe before teleporting (no lava, void, etc.)
homeSettings.logHomeActions_comment: Log home set/delete/teleport actions to server logs.

warpSettings.allowPlayerWarps_comment: Allow players to create their own warps (requires permission).
warpSettings.maxPlayerWarps_comment: Maximum number of warps a player can create. -1 for unlimited.
warpSettings.warpCooldown_comment: Cooldown in seconds between warp teleports. 0 to disable.
warpSettings.warpSetCooldown_comment: Cooldown in seconds between setting warps. 0 to disable.
warpSettings.allowCrossDimensionWarps_comment: Allow warps to be set and used across dimensions.
warpSettings.enableWarpSafety_comment: When true, warps must be safe. When false, allows warps at any location including unsafe ones.
warpSettings.logWarpActions_comment: Log warp creation/deletion/usage to server logs.
warpSettings.perWarpPermission_comment: When true, players need neoessentials.warps.<name> permission for each individual warp (Essentials: per-warp-permission).

spawnSettings.spawnOnJoin_comment: Teleport players to spawn when they join for the first time.
spawnSettings.spawnOnDeath_comment: Teleport players to spawn when they die (overrides bed spawn).
spawnSettings.spawnCooldown_comment: Cooldown in seconds between spawn teleports. 0 to disable.
spawnSettings.allowSpawnSet_comment: Allow admins to set the spawn location with /setspawn.
spawnSettings.enableSpawnSafety_comment: When true, spawn must be safe. When false, allows spawn at any location including unsafe ones.
spawnSettings.logSpawnActions_comment: Log spawn teleports and spawn point changes to server logs.

teleportRequestSettings.teleportRequestSettings_comment: Teleport request system configuration (tpa, tpask, tphere, etc.)
teleportRequestSettings.requestTimeout_comment: Time in seconds before teleport requests expire automatically.
teleportRequestSettings.maxPendingRequests_comment: Maximum number of pending requests a player can have at once.
teleportRequestSettings.cooldownBetweenRequests_comment: Cooldown in seconds between sending teleport requests.
teleportRequestSettings.allowMultipleRequests_comment: Allow players to have multiple requests to the same player.
teleportRequestSettings.enableRequestNotifications_comment: Send notifications for incoming teleport requests.
teleportRequestSettings.autoAcceptFromFriends_comment: Automatically accept teleport requests from friends (requires friends system).
teleportRequestSettings.enableTeleportSafety_comment: When true, blocks teleportation to unsafe destinations. When false, allows teleportation to any location including unsafe ones.
teleportRequestSettings.logTeleportRequests_comment: Log teleport request actions to server logs.

generalSettings.teleportDelay_comment: Delay in seconds before teleportation completes. 0 for instant teleportation.
generalSettings.cancelOnMovement_comment: Cancel teleportation if player moves during delay.
generalSettings.cancelOnDamage_comment: Cancel teleportation if player takes damage during delay.
generalSettings.enableTeleportWarmup_comment: Show countdown message during teleport delay.
generalSettings.allowTeleportInCombat_comment: Allow teleportation while in combat (requires combat system).
generalSettings.maxTeleportDistance_comment: Maximum distance for teleportation in blocks. -1 for unlimited.
generalSettings.enableParticleEffects_comment: Show particle effects at teleportation source and destination.
generalSettings.protectedAreas_comment: List of world regions where teleportation is restricted (requires region protection plugin).

randomTeleportSettings.randomTeleportSettings_comment: Random teleport (/tpr /rtp) system — ported from EssentialsX RandomTeleport
randomTeleportSettings.defaultLocation_comment: Default named location slot when /tpr is run with no argument. {world} is replaced with the player's current world name.
randomTeleportSettings.defaultMinRange_comment: Minimum distance from centre in blocks (used when no per-location value is set).
randomTeleportSettings.defaultMaxRange_comment: Maximum distance from centre in blocks. -1 = use half the world border size.
randomTeleportSettings.findAttempts_comment: Number of random positions to attempt before giving up.
randomTeleportSettings.cacheThreshold_comment: Minimum number of locations to keep pre-computed in the cache.
randomTeleportSettings.cooldown_comment: Cooldown in seconds between /tpr uses per player. 0 to disable.
randomTeleportSettings.excludedBiomes_comment: Biome resource locations to exclude globally (e.g. 'minecraft:ocean'). Per-location overrides can be set in the locations map.

locations.locations_comment: Named random teleport location slots. Use /settpr <name> in-game to update the centre. The key is the name passed to /tpr <name>.

commandCosts.commandCosts_comment: Defines the cost to use teleportation commands PER USE. Some commands have sub-costs.

moderation.moderation_comment: Moderation system configuration - controls ban, jail, vanish, freeze and kick functionality

banSettings.checkExpiredBansInterval_comment: Interval in seconds to check for expired temporary bans (300 = 5 minutes, 0 disables, min 5, default 300)
banSettings.logBanActions_comment: Log all ban/unban actions to server logs
banSettings.broadcastBans_comment: Broadcast ban actions to all online staff members

jailSettings.requireJailLocation_comment: Require jail location to be set before jailing players
jailSettings.jailTeleportOnLogin_comment: Teleport jailed players to jail when they log in
jailSettings.preventJailEscape_comment: Prevent jailed players from using teleportation commands
jailSettings.logJailActions_comment: Log all jail/unjail actions to server logs

vanishSettings.vanishOnJoin_comment: Automatically vanish staff members when they join
vanishSettings.hideFromTabList_comment: Hide vanished players from the tab list
vanishSettings.preventInteraction_comment: Prevent vanished players from interacting with non-staff
vanishSettings.broadcastToStaffVanish_comment: Broadcast vanish actions to all online staff members
vanishSettings.BroadcastToAllVanish_comment: Broadcast vanish actions to all online players with a join message or quit message
vanishSettings.logVanishActions_comment: Log vanish toggle actions to server logs

freezeSettings.preventCommands_comment: Prevent frozen players from using commands (except unfreeze-related)
freezeSettings.allowedCommands_comment: Commands that frozen players can still use
freezeSettings.freezeOnLogin_comment: Keep players frozen when they log back in
freezeSettings.freezeReminder: You are currently frozen. Contact staff if you need assistance.
freezeSettings.freezeReminderInterval_comment: Interval in seconds to remind frozen players (0 to disable)
freezeSettings.logFreezeActions_comment: Log all freeze/unfreeze actions to server logs

kickSettings.broadcastKicks_comment: Broadcast kick actions to all online staff members
kickSettings.kickAllMessage: Server maintenance in progress. Please reconnect in a few minutes.
kickSettings.notifyStaffOnKick_comment: Notify online staff members when a player is kicked
kickSettings.logKickActions_comment: Log all kick actions to server logs

generalSettings.requireReasonForActions_comment: Require staff to provide a reason for moderation actions
generalSettings.maxActionReason_comment: Maximum length for moderation action reasons
generalSettings.enableModerationHistory_comment: Keep history of moderation actions per player
generalSettings.historyLimit_comment: Maximum number of moderation actions to keep per player
generalSettings.enableStaffNotifications_comment: Send notifications to staff about moderation actions
generalSettings.staffNotificationPermission_comment: Permission required to receive staff notifications
generalSettings.moderationLogFile_comment: Log file name for moderation actions (in server logs directory)

chat.chat-format-description: Chat format template. You can use a string (for global format) or an object for per-group/world formats. Keys: 'default', 'group:GROUPNAME', 'world:WORLDNAME', or 'group:GROUP:world:WORLD'. Placeholders: {neoessentials_displayname}, {neoessentials_username}, {MESSAGE}, {neoessentials_prefix}, {neoessentials_suffix}, {neoessentials_world}, {neoessentials_x}, {neoessentials_y}, {neoessentials_z}, {neoessentials_health}, {neoessentials_level}, and more via PlaceholderAPI. Legacy uppercase placeholders like {USERNAME}, {PREFIX}, {SUFFIX} are automatically converted for backwards compatibility. Use '&' for color codes (e.g., &c for red, &6 for gold).
chat.enableChatEnhancements_comment: Enable Phase 2 chat enhancements (clickable names, mentions, URLs, item links). Set to false to use basic chat formatting only.
chat.clickablePlayerNames_comment: Make player names in chat clickable. Click to message, hover for stats.
chat.autoLinkUrls_comment: Automatically detect and make URLs clickable in chat messages.
chat.allowItemLinks_comment: Allow players to show their held item in chat using [item] placeholder.

mentions.enabled_comment: Enable @mention system. Players can mention others with @PlayerName.
mentions.highlightColor_comment: Color code for highlighted mentions (e.g., &e for yellow, &6 for gold).
mentions.playSound_comment: Play sound notification when a player is mentioned.
mentions.soundName_comment: Sound to play for mentions. Options: entity.experience_orb.pickup, block.note_block.pling, etc.
mentions.requirePermission_comment: If true, players need 'neoessentials.chat.mention' permission to mention others.

badges.enabled_comment: Enable badge/icon system. Shows rank badges and status icons in chat.
badges.useCustomImages_comment: If true, uses custom badge images from config/neoessentials/badges/ folder. Place PNG files named after ranks (e.g., admin.png, vip.png).
badges.customImageSize_comment: Size of custom badge images in pixels (16, 24, or 32). Images will be scaled to this size.
badges.customImagePath_comment: Path to custom badge images folder relative to server root. Place PNG files here named after ranks.
badges.autoSendResourcePack_comment: If true, automatically generates and sends resource pack to players when they join. Requires useCustomImages to be enabled.
badges.requireResourcePack_comment: If true, players MUST accept the resource pack to join the server. If false, it's optional.
badges.resourcePackUrl_comment: Public URL where the resource pack is hosted (e.g., https://yoursite.com/NeoEssentials-Badges.zip). Leave empty to disable auto-send. The mod will generate the pack in config/neoessentials/ - upload it to a web server.
badges.resourcePackPrompt: This server uses custom badge images. Please accept the resource pack for the best experience!
badges.resourcePackPrompt_comment: Message shown to players when sending the resource pack.
badges.rankBadges_comment: Badge emojis for each rank. If useCustomImages is true, the mod looks for <rankname>.png files in the badges folder.

statusIcons.enabled_comment: Show status icons (AFK, vanished, etc.) in chat.

capsFilter.maxPercentage_comment: Maximum percentage of caps allowed (1-100). Messages above this are filtered.
capsFilter.action_comment: Action to take: 'lowercase' (convert to lowercase), 'block' (block message), 'warn' (warn player).
capsFilter.minimumLength_comment: Minimum message length to check caps (avoid filtering short messages like 'OK').

repeatFilter.enabled_comment: Prevent players from repeating identical messages.
repeatFilter.cooldownSeconds_comment: Seconds before same message can be sent again.

spamFilter.enabled_comment: Rate limit chat messages to prevent spam.
spamFilter.periodSeconds_comment: Period in seconds to count messages.

formatTemplates.enabled_comment: Enable pre-built format templates. When enabled, uses 'activeTemplate' instead of 'chat-format'.

richText.enabled_comment: Enable Phase 4 rich text effects (gradients, rainbow). Note: These effects require permissions and can be performance-intensive.
richText.allowGradients_comment: Allow gradient text using <gradient:START-END>text</gradient> syntax. Example: <gradient:FF0000-0000FF>Hello</gradient>
richText.requirePermission_comment: If true, players need 'neoessentials.chat.richtext' permission to use rich text effects.

conditionalFormatting.enabled_comment: Enable Phase 4 conditional formatting. Allows dynamic chat formats based on time, stats, and player state.
conditionalFormatting.allowTimeConditionals_comment: Allow time-based conditions: <if:time=morning>Good morning!</if>. Supported: morning, afternoon, evening, night, day, weekday, weekend.
conditionalFormatting.allowStatConditionals_comment: Allow stat-based conditions: <if:health<50>Low health!</if>. Supported: health, level, food, armor, xp with operators <, >, <=, >=, =, !=
conditionalFormatting.allowStateConditionals_comment: Allow state-based conditions: <if:afk>AFK</if>. Supported: afk, vanished, flying, creative, survival, spectator, op, sneaking, sprinting, swimming, onfire, wet, underground, nether, end, overworld.

channels.enabled-description: Master switch for chat channels system. When false, all channels are disabled and players use default global chat. When true, channels work according to their individual settings below.

discord.enabled_comment: Send local chat messages to Discord. Usually disabled since local is proximity-based.
discord.channelId_comment: Discord channel ID to send messages to. Leave empty to use default 'chat' channel. Get ID by right-clicking channel in Discord (Developer Mode enabled).

discord.enabled_comment: Send global chat messages to Discord.
discord.channelId_comment: Discord channel ID to send messages to. Leave empty to use default 'chat' channel.

discord.enabled_comment: Send staff chat messages to Discord.
discord.channelId_comment: Discord channel ID for staff chat. Leave empty to use default 'staff' or 'moderation' channel. Recommended to use a private staff-only Discord channel.

chat.channels-description: Chat channels system: Set 'enabled' to false to disable all channels and use standard global chat. When enabled, players can use local (proximity-based), global (all players), and staff (permission-based) channels. Each channel has its own enabled flag, command, prefix, and settings. For proximity-only servers: set channels.enabled=true, local.enabled=true, global.enabled=false. For global-only servers: set channels.enabled=false OR set local.enabled=false, global.enabled=true.
chat.logChatToConsole_comment: Log all chat messages to the server console and logs. When NeoEssentials handles chat formatting, vanilla console logging is replaced by this. Set to false to suppress chat from console/logs entirely.
chat.customJoinMessage_comment: Custom join message template. Use 'none' for default. Available placeholders: {neoessentials_displayname}, {neoessentials_username}, {neoessentials_prefix}, {neoessentials_suffix}, {neoessentials_world}, and more via PlaceholderAPI. Legacy uppercase like {USERNAME}, {PREFIX} also work. Use '&' for colors. Example: '&a{neoessentials_prefix}&f{neoessentials_displayname} &ejoined the server!'
chat.customQuitMessage_comment: Custom quit message template. Use 'none' for default. Available placeholders: {neoessentials_displayname}, {neoessentials_username}, {neoessentials_prefix}, {neoessentials_suffix}, {neoessentials_world}, and more via PlaceholderAPI. Legacy uppercase like {USERNAME}, {PREFIX} also work. Use '&' for colors. Example: '&c{neoessentials_prefix}&f{neoessentials_displayname} &eleft the server!'
chat.customNewUsernameMessage_comment: Custom message for player name changes. Use 'none' for default. Available placeholders: {neoessentials_displayname}, {neoessentials_username}, {neoessentials_prefix}, {neoessentials_suffix}, and more via PlaceholderAPI. Legacy uppercase like {USERNAME}, {PREFIX} also work. Use '&' for colors. Example: '&6{neoessentials_prefix}&f{neoessentials_displayname} &echanged their name!'

tablist.enabled_comment: Enable the custom tablist header/footer system.
tablist.refreshInterval_comment: How often (in ticks, 20 = 1 second) to refresh the tablist for all players.
tablist.hideVanished_comment: Hide vanished players from the online count for non-staff viewers.
tablist.playerFormat_comment: Format for each player row. Supports {prefix}, {player}, {suffix}, {group}.
tablist.header_comment: Header displayed above the player list. Can be a string or array for animation frames. Supports placeholders: {player}, {displayname}, {online}, {max}, {ping}, {world}, {tps}, {time}, {server_name}, {x}, {y}, {z}, {balance}, {prefix}, {suffix}, {group}, {newline}, {bar}. Use & for colour codes.
tablist.footer_comment: Footer displayed below the player list. Same placeholder support as header. Use an array for animated frames.
